item.title: About
item.description: About wartwork is a wargame artwork blog from John Edwards, the publisher of https://www.simpubs.org, the archive of SPI games. In re-creating classic artwork of the 70s and 80s, mainly from SPI, GDW and The Avalon Hill Games Company (aka AH, or TAHGC), I have learned a lot about design principles and practices. This site is intended to bring some together and publish them to share with like minded enthusiasts/fools.

item.title: Favourite Wargames
item.description: wartwork’s Favourite Wargames wartwork is all about wargames, and we have some favourites. As you will see elsewhere, classic 70s and 80s games from SPI and GDW are our top picks, even today. Top 10 These are some of our all time favourites, in no particular order Panzgruppe Guderian (SPI) Fire in the East/Scorched Earth (GDW) Smolensk: Barbarossa Derailed (OCS Series, MMP) Atlantic Wall (SPI and Decision Games) Pandora - The Voyage of the BSM Pandora and The Wreck of the BSM Pandora (SPI) Cobra (SPI and Decision Games) Napoleon’s Last Battles (SPI) Holland ‘44 (GMT) Freedom in the Galaxy (SPI) Twilight Struggle (GMT) Guderian gets in for the game and the system, spawning Operation Typhoon, The Army Group South quad, and many more.

item.title: Pandora Counters
item.description: The Voyage and Wreck of the BSM Pandora The two Pandora games published in Ares magazine are SPI classics. wartwork has been working to clean up and re-create them for fun, possible use in a vassal module, or for use in some Universe campaigns.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Contact You can contact wartwork on Twitter, Facebook or email with the links at the top. Some of our content is also on github at jzedwards. Privacy We don’t keep any information about you, so can’t have any privacy obligations.

item.title: Warts
